Patch Set 4:

When I try to run coala locally I get this error ? any hints on what I havent installed.

(base) root@njcdtl01bf1936:/home2/bf1936/ONAP/testsuite.master.20200408a/robot/assets/policy# coala --non-interactive --disable-caching --no-autoapply-warn yaml --files vFirewall_policy_operational_content.yaml
[WARNING][10:49:47] The default coafile '.coafile' was not found. You can generate a configuration file with your current options by adding the `--save` flag or suppress any use of config files with `-I`.
[WARNING][10:49:47] The requested section 'yaml' is not existent. Thus it cannot be executed.
[WARNING][10:49:47] coala will not run any analysis. Did you forget to give the `--bears` argument?

In any case, try to align "type" and "type_version" in the same column, may be that's the reason.

> not sure why the linting is failing and cant run it locally

you can run locally by running
tox -eyaml
you will get also the same error using an online yaml editor such as http://www.yamllint.com/
I submitted a fix, and I add Bartek in review, he fixed lots of yaml errors in the integration repositories..
